name: interviewai-arabia
description: Arabic-first AI interview coach — monorepo (backend + admin + mobile/web)

scripts.install:all: npm install --include=dev --prefix backend && npm install --include=dev --prefix admin && npm install --include=dev --prefix mobile
scripts.build:admin: npm run build --prefix admin && rm -rf backend/public/admin && mkdir -p backend/public && cp -r admin/dist backend/public/admin
scripts.build:web: npm run build:web --prefix mobile && rm -rf backend/public/web && cp -r mobile/dist backend/public/web
scripts.build:vercel: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build:admin && npm run build:web
